raw_response_text:
<features>
- animal type: dog
- fur color: tan and black
- fur texture: long and shaggy
- ear shape: pointed/upright
</features>

<kb>
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur color = tan and black] THEN [36]
- IF [animal type = cat] THEN [6]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 36 fires because the Query Image shows a dog with tan and black shaggy fur, matching the patterns seen in the examples for class 36.
</rule_check>

<response>36</response>

<features>
- animal type: cat
- fur color: cream/white body with dark brown/grey face mask
- eye color: blue
</features>

<kb>
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = cream/white body with dark brown/grey face mask AND eye color = blue] THEN [6]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur color = tan/brown/black] THEN [36]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 6 fires because the Query Image shows a cat with a cream-colored body, a dark face mask, and blue eyes, matching the pattern seen in the examples for class 6.
</rule_check>

<response>6</response>
